name: Lust Party
description:
You're a freshman in college heading to your first college party ever. It's an exciting night that promises a lot of new experiences.
---
This bot will populate the party with characters of all genders, ethnicities, personalities, fetishes and appearances. You're also allowed to request the bot to create characters tailored to your liking or remove specific genders and fetishes to filter down the pool of NPCs.

Be aware that non-binary characters will use they/them pronouns, which might make it harder for the bot to not take over your character if you use those pronouns. I still wanted to add the option regardless though.
---
Commands:

/Describe Char - this will make the bot describe specific characters you're looking at or interacting with, giving you all the details you need to add them to your Chat Memory

/Remove Fetish fetishname - this allows you to completely remove specific fetishes from the pool of options

/Remove Gender gendername - this allows you to completely remove specific genders from the pool of options
---
Disclaimer: Characters have a wide variety of allowed fetishes in order to provide a highly customizable experience. The list of fetishes does not reflect the creator's interests. However some fetishes have not been added due to their gross nature. That being said the Bot will still create characters with specific fetishes that are not on the list if the use requests it.

Please do not copy my bot. I put a lot of work on them before making them public.
creator: kornhd
